channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Road traffic sign abandoned, 4th July
item.description:
This sign is for works carrried out over two months ago. It seems to have been abandoned or forgotten

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Urlwin Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lights not working, 4th July
item.description:
The street lights around John Gorsuch House and Daniels Road are not working. The area doesn’t feel safe and is attracting group of people who are hanging out late at night to play music.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Daniels Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: I know this is private land but the flytip is mainly foodstuff, 4th July
item.description:
I know this is private land but the flytip consists of bags of food waste which is a health hazard as attracting foxes and rats Can this be reviewed by environment health and appropriate action be taken

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 147, Byne Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Zip line is locked, 4th July
item.description:
Someone put a lock on the Zip line, so kids no longer can ride it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wirral Wood Close, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Junction of Bromley Hill & Park Avenue, 4th July
item.description:
Badly damaged pavement and manhole. Potentially very dangerous for pedestrians as very near to busy road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bromley Hill, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Pavement Defect (uneven surface / cracked paving slab)

item.title: Tons of building waste, 4th July
item.description:
Tons of building waste has just been dumped at the bins. Some of it has just been strewn on the ground
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 66-80, Druid Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Near 43 Hopefield Avenue, 4th July
item.description:
Dumped garden and household waste. Quite heavy.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hopefield Avenue, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Light labelled number 7 on Murray Street, 4th July
item.description:
This streetlight column door has been broken for months - I tried to report it before (on LoveCleanStreets) but didn’t know the right place to report it previously. It does t seem possible to just place the cover on again - please can someone attend to it?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Camden Road, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Corner of Tennyson Road a d Esmond Rd, 4th July
item.description:
The bag has been laying in the same spot for 5 days and hasnt been picked up.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tennyson Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This pond is nearly empty, 4th July
item.description:
I understand that this pond is managed by Greenwich council. In summers past it has been topped up by a mains pipe. It is running very low and wildlife is being threatened. I read the enclosed posts on Facebook tonight so concerns are rising. Apparently it is being passed around can someone kindly take ownership of this and fill the pond up. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blackheath Avenue, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Extremely large tree/vegetation overhang property line, 4th July
item.description:
Tree roughly 30/35FT tall in back garden of 29 Mosslea Road overhanging into 30A Mosslea Road, almost into 31 Mosslea Road. Tree causing structural damage to roof of building in back garden of 30A Mosslea Road and blocking sunlight into flats at 30 Mosslea Road. Back garden of 29 Mosslea Road is abandoned and is causing foxes and rats . Tree has been overhanging and not tended to in over 3 years at least and garden itself of 29 Mosslea Road has been abandoned for at least 3 years also.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mosslea Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Another Lime bike abandoned in The Avenue,north side opposite Repton Court, 4th July
item.description:
I noticed an abandoned Lime bike in The Avenue on the grass verge on the North side of The Avenue opposite Repton Court. Please can it be removed - thanks!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Avenue, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged and uprooted width restriction post, 4th July
item.description:
Damaged by car incident it appears.. have photos but not uploading. Police had cordoned off damaged car. Car now removed
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Auckland Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: West end Brondesbury villas, 4th July
item.description:
Filthy !

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 51 Chichester Road, 4th July
item.description:
A black samsonite suitcase has been left outside 51 Chichester Road for over a day.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chichester Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Ajax Road parking, 4th July
item.description:
There are areas of uneven and deteriorated road surface along the carriageway edge, particularly near the kerbside parking area. The surface appears worn and uneven, with shallow depressions and broken/loose material in places. Please could the highway team inspect and repair as necessary

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Ajax Road, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Roadwork signs left behind, 4th July
item.description:
A number of roadwork signs from previous road closure remain and cover a length of 100m or so (think there were about 5 in total). In Copers Cope Road - from Avery Close to Century Way They are also damaging the grass. Please can these be picked up
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Utility Works and Temporary Traffic Lights

item.title: Water leak in road, 4th July
item.description:
Water leaking into road outside Toby Carvery on A21
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Victoria Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 4th July
item.description:
Street is dumping ground

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lightcliffe Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge with rotting food left outside the block, 4th July
item.description:
Has been there for about a week now

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Homerton High Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
